2604.09697.title: I Can't Believe TTA Is Not Better: When Test-Time Augmentation Hurts Medical Image Classification
2604.09697.paper_summary: Test-time augmentation (TTA)--aggregating predictions over multiple augmented copies of a test input--is widely assumed to improve classification accuracy, particularly in medical imaging where it is routinely deployed in production systems and competition solutions. We present a systematic empirical study challenging this assumption across three MedMNIST v2 benchmarks and four architectures spanning three orders of magnitude in parameter count (21K to 11M). Our principal finding is that TTA with standard augmentation pipelines consistently degrades accuracy relative to single-pass inference, with drops as severe as 31.6 percentage points for ResNet-18 on pathology images. This degradation affects all architectures, including convolutional models, and worsens with more augmented views. The sole exception is ResNet-18 on dermatology images, which gains a modest +1.6%. We identify the distribution shift between augmented and training-time inputs--amplified by batch normalization statistics mismatch--as the primary mechanism. Our ablation studies show that augmentation strategy matters critically: intensity-only augmentations preserve more performance than geometric transforms, and including the original unaugmented image partially mitigates but does not eliminate the accuracy drop. These findings serve as a cautionary note for practitioners: TTA should not be applied as a default post-hoc improvement but must be validated on the specific model-dataset combination.
2604.09697.paper_summary_zh: 測試時增強（TTA）——對多個增強版本的測試輸入進行預測聚合——被廣泛認為能提高分類準確性，特別是在醫學影像領域，該技術已在生產系統和競賽解決方案中常規使用。我們進行了一項系統的實證研究，挑戰這一假設，涵蓋三個 MedMNIST v2 基準和四種架構，參數數量跨越三個數量級（21K 到 11M）。我們的主要發現是，使用標準增強管道的 TTA 在準確性上相對於單次推理持續下降，對於 ResNet-18 在病理圖像上的下降幅度高達 31.6 個百分點。這一降級影響所有架構，包括卷積模型，並且隨著增強視圖的增加而惡化。唯一的例外是 ResNet-18 在皮膚科圖像上的表現，獲得了 +1.6% 的小幅提升。我們確定增強輸入與訓練時輸入之間的分佈轉變——由於批量正規化統計不匹配而加劇——是主要機制。我們的消融研究顯示，增強策略至關重要：僅強度的增強比幾何變換能保留更多性能，並且包含原始未增強圖像可以部分減輕但無法消除準確性下降。這些發現對從業者來說是一個警示：TTA 不應作為默認的事後改進使用，而必須在特定的模型-數據集組合上進行驗證。
2604.09697.author: Daniel Nobrega Medeiros et.al.
